## centronias SSH Access Report

### Direct Finding: YES, centronias has SSH access

**Location:** `/home/clungus/.ssh/authorized_keys` contains an RSA key with comment `me@centronias.com`:
```
ssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQAB...sfCiQ== me@centronias.com
```

This key grants SSH access as the `clungus` user. Since `clungus` has **passwordless sudo** (`clungus ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL` in `/etc/sudoers`), this effectively gives centronias **full root access** ...(truncated)
